title: XP 2 items
description: trade your xp to get randomly selected items

# Overview
This mod adds a single item to the game: the XP talisman. It is crafted by a diamond and an ender pearl. right clicking with this item removes your xp and drops an item for each 25 xp.
# Configurable options
* You can change the amount of xp required per item drop in the config file.
* You can change the amount of items per _x_ xp
* When setting the amount of needed xp to 0, the "level mode" is active, meaning you get items for each level, instead of points.
* Normal loot tables (block drops, mob loot, chests) can be disabled
# Feedback wanted!
Please report any bugs you find in my Discord. If you have ideas how I could improve this mod, or new content I should add, that feedback is also welcome.
